components.name: TransformationProject
components.prompt: Convert this dark themed dashboard UI to React + Tailwind code. It features a project header, a tabbed navigation bar (Project Scope, History Analysis, etc.), and a 'History Analysis' section with a table showing System, Status with progress bars, Performance details, and Actions. The table has rows for PO1, PO2, PO3. There is a blue 'OPEN JIVS IMP DEPLOYMENT' button at the bottom right.
